channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Trump proposes 20% toll on cargo through Strait of Hormuz; restarts Iran blockade
item.description: The Strait of Hormuz is a major oil-shipping route and the epicenter of the U.S. and Israel's ongoing war with Iran.

item.title: Trump recommends Lindsey Graham's sister serve as interim senator for South Carolina
item.description: The death of Sen. Lindsey Graham ignited a scramble among South Carolina Republicans to prepare for a special primary election to replace him on the GOP ticket.

item.title: SpaceX stock sinks for a second-straight day, nearing $135 IPO price
item.description: SpaceX went public a month ago in a record IPO. Elon Musk's space and AI company was added to the Nasdaq-100 last week.

item.title: Trump calls for Congress to pass Clarity Act crypto bill to honor Lindsey Graham
item.description: The Senate Banking Committee approved the bill 15-9 in May, with two Democrats joining Republicans to advance the legislation.

item.title: Paramount, WBD hit with lawsuit from 12 states, including California, to block merger
item.description: A group of states, including California, filed a lawsuit to block the merger between Paramount and Warner Bros. Discovery.

item.title: Josh Brown has stuck with these two names on his Best Stocks list. It's paying off
item.description: Good ideas are worth sticking with, says Josh Brown. Here are two such stocks.

item.title: Big banks poised to report booming revenue propelled by SpaceX IPO, Iran war volatility
item.description: Big banks are set to report booming Q2 revenue as the SpaceX IPO, Iran war volatility and a rebound in commercial lending fuel Wall Street's "sweet spot."

item.title: Meta's Louisiana data center investment to reach $50 billion, aided by generous tax incentives
item.description: Meta said the planned Hyperion data center supercluster in Richland Parish, Louisiana, will be a 5GW facility and cost more than $50 billion.

item.title: Khosla family agrees to purchase defending Super Bowl champion Seattle Seahawks for $9.612 billion, sources say
item.description: Paul Allen's estate announced on Feb. 18 that it was selling the team, which is coming off its second Super Bowl victory in franchise history.

item.title: Kalshi launches 'Pro' product for users trading multiple markets at same time, perpetual futures
item.description: The platform is designed to alleviate problems the company's most active traders have run into, according to a memo provided to CNBC.

item.title: The 10 best state economies in America in 2026
item.description: Economy is one of the most important categories in CNBC’s annual America’s Top States for Business rankings. Several states stand out for economic strength.

item.title: The 10 worst state economies in America in 2026
item.description: Economy is a key category in CNBC’s America’s Top States for Business study, and some states stand out for the wrong reasons.

item.title: Burnout, frustration and heartbreak: Amazon layoffs take their toll in saturated job market
item.description: In the eight-plus months since Amazon announced its most expansive job cuts ever, laid off workers have been thrust into an increasingly saturated labor market.

item.title: Graham’s death complicates myriad GOP goals in Congress
item.description: South Carolina Republican Sen. Lindsey Graham died unexpectedly at 71.

item.title: Disney could rally 40% if it takes this bold step, says Wells Fargo
item.description: Disney's content is getting more valuable while its online distribution business is less competitive, the investment bank said.

item.title: Outbreak of diarrhea-causing parasite grows to more than 1,000 cases
item.description: No deaths have been reported and the source of the cyclospora infections hasn't been identified.

item.title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman spar on X after Apple files OpenAI lawsuit
item.description: Sam Altman insisted that Elon Musk was again obsessed with him because of an OpenAI model release earlier this week.

item.title: AI is changing older workers' careers, research finds — here's how
item.description: AI may either prompt some older workers to leave their jobs or help make their roles more efficient, research finds. Here's which careers may be most affected.

item.title: New Zealand actor Sam Neill dies aged 78
item.description: Sam Neill, the New Zealand actor best known for playing paleontologist Dr. Alan Grant in dinosaur blockbuster "Jurassic Park" has died at the age of 78.

item.title: TSMC, the world's largest contract chipmaker, reports 68% surge in June revenue
item.description: Ahead of its second-quarter earnings, TSMC reported its June and first-half revenue for 2026.

item.title: We're buying more of Jim Cramer's new favorite chip stock on the dip
item.description: We're picking up more shares, consistent with the game plan we laid out in Friday's Morning Meeting.

item.title: Best checking account bonuses of July 2026: Up to $5,000
item.description: Want to earn hundreds (or even thousands) of dollars just by opening a new account? Here's how.

item.title: Buy now, stress later? The risk of paying late
item.description: 'Buy Now, Pay Later' loans have been on the rise as consumers look to the products not to pay for luxuries, but to help manage the rising cost of daily expenses. New data now show a growing number of borrowers are falling behind. CNBC's Sharon Epperson joins 'Squawk Box' with more.

item.title: A tiny GLP-1 implant is the latest bet to help patients maintain their weight loss
item.description: Vivani Medical is developing an implant of semaglutide, the active ingredient in Novo Nordisk's obesity injection Wegovy and diabetes counterpart Ozempic.

item.title: McConnell provides health update after long unexplained absence; says he suffered fall, pneumonia
item.description: McConnell is the longest-serving party leader in Senate history.

item.title: Trump Accounts: Who is eligible, how $1,000 deposits work and how to open one
item.description: Trump Accounts officially launched in July, introducing a new tax-deferred investing option for children. Here are the key features.

item.title: Chinese EV makers are outpacing U.S. automakers in overseas investments
item.description: China has a saturated domestic market, which has led Chinese companies to look elsewhere to sell electric vehicles.

item.title: Who will replace Lindsey Graham in the Senate?
item.description: South Carolina GOP Rep. Nancy Mace and Gov. Henry McMaster are among the first to be floated for the Senate seat vacated by Lindsey Graham.

item.title: New housing law targets affordability — what it means for homebuyers and sellers
item.description: While the legislation is aimed at least partly at addressing affordability, experts say the benefits of the measure will take time to show up in the market.

item.title: India's inflation accelerates to 4.38% in June, exceeding forecasts
item.description: Inflation has risen for the eighth straight month in India, as food and energy prices rise due to the Iran war and deficient rainfall.
